subcodes.first_line: O handmaid of God! They offer praise of thee beyond all description, for, praised be God, thou art a spark from the fire of the love of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امه الله تعریفی زایدالوصف از شما مینمایند که الحمد لله قبسه نار محبت اللهست
subcodes.subjects: @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @service to others; to the Cause of God
